backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Vehicle, Variant, Color, Promotion, Testimonial, BlogPost, MediaAsset, etc.) and including mixins for blob storage, access control, and authorization with session storage for Google OAuth tokens.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three completed features: adding white 'Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang' title to mobile navbar, removing 'Simulasi Kredit' menu item, and adding Bottom CTA Bar to desktop view.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and layouts with descriptions of their functionality and data flow.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file (content truncated or not present).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Indonesian language setting, viewport meta tag, and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router configuration defining all public routes (Beranda, Mobil Keluarga, Mobil Niaga, Promo, Testimoni, Blog, Kontak, Simulasi Kredit) and admin routes with AuthGuard protection.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog component for creating and editing admin users with form fields for name, email, and principal ID (for new users only), using React Query mutations for CRUD operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Displays a table of admin users with edit and delete actions, showing email, name, and role. Prevents deletion of the last admin and shows loading skeletons while fetching data.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: Modal dialog for selecting banner images from uploaded media assets, filtering for images with 'banner' in filename. Displays images in a radio-group grid with dimension recommendations for main and CTA banners.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: Form dialog for creating and editing blog posts with title, excerpt, and content fields. Validates delegation token expiration before submission and handles both create and update operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Table view of blog posts with edit, delete, and publish/unpublish toggle actions. Shows post title, creation date, and publication status with confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Grid display of uploaded media assets with preview thumbnails for images and file info for other types. Provides copy-to-clipboard for asset IDs and delete functionality with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: File upload component with drag-and-drop support for images and PDFs, validating file types and sizes. Checks delegation token validity before upload and shows progress feedback during upload operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: Dialog component for creating and editing passenger vehicles with form fields for vehicle name, description, and base price. Uses custom hooks for create/update mutations and manages form state with validation.
Table component displaying all vehicles with edit, delete, and publish status toggle actions. Includes loading skeletons, empty state, and confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: Dialog component for creating and editing promotions with fields for title, description, start date, and end date. Handles date conversion to/from nanosecond timestamps for backend compatibility.
Table component displaying all promotions with period dates, active status toggle, edit and delete actions. Includes loading states, empty state, and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Dialog component for creating and editing testimonials with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1-5). Validates rating range and manages timestamp conversion for new testimonials.
Table component displaying all testimonials with customer name, content preview, star rating visualization, and edit/delete actions. Includes loading skeletons and empty state message.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component with comprehensive delegation validation logging, expiration monitoring, localStorage recovery mechanism, and redirect logic for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a list of 5 hardcoded article links with navigation to blog detail pages using slug-based routing.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with call, WhatsApp, credit simulation, and menu buttons; includes a dropdown menu overlay for site navigation.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Variant selector component for commercial vehicles that displays buttons for each variant and triggers callback on selection change.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Fetches and displays a CTA banner image from media assets API with fallback to static generated image on error.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer with logo, contact info, social media links, operating hours, and visitor statistics fetched from API.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Dynamic hero banner that displays page-specific title, icon, background color, and subtext based on current pathname.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Carousel section displaying up to 8 family vehicle catalogs fetched from API using VehicleCard components.
Carousel section displaying up to 8 commercial vehicle catalogs fetched from API with yellow-themed heading.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Fetches and displays main banner image from media assets API with fallback to static generated image on error.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop menu, and mobile hamburger menu for site-wide navigation.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Like and share buttons for vehicle products with counters, using custom hook for interaction tracking and native share API support.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of the first 4 featured vehicles from the catalog using VehicleCard components with loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Provides a search input that redirects to the mobil-keluarga page with a search query parameter when submitted.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Displays three promotional features (flexible installments, low down payment, negotiable price) in a grid layout with icons.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static about section describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang dealership and their services.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive component for selecting vehicle variants and colors, notifying parent component of selection changes via callback.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying vehicle image, name, price, and detail link with slug-based URL generation.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian language labels, validation messages, and UI text constants for the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling anonymous and authenticated states with query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Query hook for fetching admin dashboard statistics; currently returns default zeros as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: CRUD hooks for admin user management with authentication/network error handling; backend methods not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Query and mutation hooks for blog post CRUD operations with error handling and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: CRUD hooks for commercial vehicle categories; all backend methods are stubbed as not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting contact form data (name, email, message) via the actor, currently stubbed with a console warning.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch all contact submissions from the backend, currently returning an empty array as the backend method is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting credit simulation data (vehicleId, amount, term) via the actor, currently stubbed with a console warning.
Provides a query hook to fetch all credit simulations from the backend, currently returning an empty array as the backend method is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication with React context, providing login/logout functionality, identity state management, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides query and mutation hooks for media asset management (upload, delete, fetch) with error handling for auth/network issues and toast notifications; backend methods are partially stubbed.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides hooks for product like/share functionality including count queries and mutation actions, currently stubbed with console warnings as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: Provides CRUD hooks for promotions (create, update, delete, fetch all) with error handling for auth/network issues and toast notifications; backend methods are currently stubbed.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Provides query hooks to fetch vehicle catalogs and individual vehicle-with-catalog data, currently returning empty arrays/null as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch website settings from the backend, currently returning null as the backend method is not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides CRUD hooks for testimonials (create, update, delete, fetch all) with error handling for auth/network issues and toast notifications; backend methods are currently stubbed.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: React Query hooks for vehicle CRUD operations (getAll, get, create, update, delete) with authentication and network error handling, currently stubbed to return empty/null until backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and updating visitor statistics (total, daily, weekly, monthly, pageViews) from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and updating website settings with authentication and network error handling, currently stubbed until backend implementation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components like sidebar, cards, buttons, and charts.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin dashboard layout with collapsible sidebar navigation, session validation, auto-logout on expired delegation, and responsive mobile behavior with click-outside-to-close.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout wrapper that conditionally renders Navbar, HeroSection (except homepage), main content, Footer, and BottomCTABar.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the root App component.
Admin page for managing admin users with list view, add/edit dialog, and delete functionality using Principal-based authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Admin page for managing blog posts with list view, add/edit dialog, and cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder admin page for commercial vehicles that redirects users to the family vehicles page, as category filtering is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Admin page displaying a sortable table of credit simulations submitted by visitors, showing vehicle ID, amount, term, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard showing overview statistics in cards: passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and total visitors.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Admin page displaying a sortable table of contact form submissions with name, email, message, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Admin page for managing media assets with upload zone and grid view, invalidating cache on successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles with add/edit functionality via dialog and vehicle list display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with add/edit functionality via dialog and promo list display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add/edit/delete functionality, including confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin page displaying visitor statistics in cards: total, daily, weekly, monthly visitors, and page views.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for configuring website settings including site info, contact details, social media URLs, and banner images with image picker dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that triggers Internet Identity authentication and redirects to admin dashboard on success, with loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage composing multiple sections: main banner, vehicle highlights, CTA banner, about section, features, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for blog article detail view, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for blog listing view, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Contact form page that collects customer information (name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, down payment, tenor, message) and submits via useContactForm hook with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Family vehicle detail page displaying vehicle information, variant/color selector, price, specifications, features, and product interactions with action buttons for contacting sales, credit simulation, and brochure download.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Family vehicle listing page that displays up to 8 published vehicles in a responsive grid using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Commercial vehicle category page that displays vehicles filtered by category slug with a capitalized category title and grid of VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Commercial vehicle detail page similar to family vehicle detail but uses CommercialVariantSelector (no color selection) and displays variant-specific pricing and specifications.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Commercial vehicle category selection page displaying three categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to category-specific pages.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder promo page displaying a development message directing users to contact sales for current promotions.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form page that collects customer and vehicle financing details, calculates estimated monthly installments in real-time, and submits via useCreditSimulationForm hook.
Placeholder testimonial page displaying a development message thanking users for their trust.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: TypeScript type definitions for frontend use matching backend types including Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleImage, Specification, Feature, VehicleCatalog, Promotion, Testimonial, BlogPost, MediaAsset, WebsiteSettings, AdminUser, ContactSubmission, CreditSimulation, VisitorStats, and CommercialVehicleCategory.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Utility function that calculates monthly loan installments using loan amount, down payment, tenor, and 8% annual interest rate with standard amortization formula.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Form validation utility functions for common input types including required fields, email, phone, length constraints, numeric values, and URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for sidebar/card/chart components, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata for Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang dealership website tracking three feature requests related to navigation bar modifications and CTA bar visibility.
